/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/awh_setup.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/bias.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/biasgrid.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/biassharing.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/biasstate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/bias_fep_lambda_state.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/friction_metric.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/awh-test.dir/__/__/__/__/testutils/unittest_main.cpp.o" -o ../../../../../bin/awh-test  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../../../lib/libtestutils.a ../../../../../lib/libgromacs.so.10.0.0 ../../../../../lib/libgmock.so.1.13.0 -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a ../../../../../lib/libgtest.so.1.13.0 -Wl,-rpath-link,/mnt/c/Users/enduser/Desktop/gromacs-2025.2/build/lib
